start.text: You're a private investigator in a rain-slicked metropolis in 2077. A mysterious client has offered you a fortune to retrieve a stolen data chip. You're at a crossroads.

choices.text: Head to the Neon Dragon nightclub to find your informant.
Break into the corporate archives where the chip was last seen.
Wait in your office for more information.

neon_dragon.text: The Neon Dragon is a sensory overload of holographic ads and synth music. Your informant, a cyborg named Kai, is at the bar. He looks nervous.

choices.text: Subtly ask Kai about the chip.

archives_entry.text: The archives are housed in a sterile mega-corporation tower. The front desk is guarded by an imposing security cyborg.

office_fail.text: You wait for hours, but no one calls. The trail goes cold. Your career fizzles out in this lonely, rain-streaked office. A pathetic end.

kai_success.text: Kai discreetly slides a keycard across the bar. 'The chip is in a high-security vault. This will get you in,' he whispers. 'Now get out of here.' You have what you need.

kai_fail.text: Your loud demands attract the attention of corporate enforcers. A brutal fight breaks out. You're no match for their augmented muscle.

archives_success.text: The guard's optical sensors whir as he scans the credits. He nods, disabling the security lasers for 60 seconds. You stride towards the vault, the mission a success.

archives_fail.text: You slip into the shadows, but silent alarms trip instantly. Red lasers grid the hallway. There is no escape.
